query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: New York
Destination: Sharm El-Sheikh
Dates: 2026-07-13 to 2026-07-16
Budget: Luxury
Party: Family
Interests: Cultural Tourism, Festivals and Events, Cultural Exploration

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The Travel Plan adheres to the expected JSON structure with correct keys, data types, and nesting for trip details, itinerary, budget breakdown, and landmarks.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The suggested hotel, JAZ Neo Naama Bay, is in Sharm El-Sheikh, matching the destination, and is described as 'luxurious', aligning with the user's 'Luxury' budget and 'Family' party preferences.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The plan explicitly states 'Luxury' level and the estimated costs, while not detailed per person, align with a luxury family trip for accommodation and general activities within Sharm El-Sheikh, given no specific monetary budget was provided by the user.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: Activities within each day are consistently ordered by time, progressing from morning to evening in a logical chronological sequence.

judge_grader.reason: All specified constraints (destination, duration, budget, number of people, and dates) are met by the travel plan.

generated_plan.trip_summary: A luxurious 4-day family trip from Cairo to Sharm El-Sheikh, focusing on cultural tourism and exploration. Enjoy fascinating attractions and exquisite dining experiences.

activities.title: Hotel Check-in at JAZ Neo Naama Bay
activities.description: Arrive in Sharm El-Sheikh and check into the luxurious JAZ Neo Naama Bay hotel, your comfortable base for the trip. Take some time to settle in and freshen up.

activities.title: Explore Beautiful Place
activities.description: Begin your cultural journey at this highly-rated tourist destination. Discover the charm and beauty of this popular spot, perfect for family photos and enjoying the local atmosphere.

activities.title: Lunch at Dananeer Restaurant Sea Food & Steak House
activities.description: Savor a delightful lunch featuring chef's specials at Dananeer Restaurant, known for its excellent seafood and steak. A perfect culinary start to your trip.

activities.title: Discover Street Art
activities.description: Immerse yourselves in the vibrant local art scene by exploring the captivating Street Art. This outdoor gallery offers unique perspectives and photo opportunities.

activities.title: Visit الفنار
activities.description: Head to الفنار, a highly-rated attraction, offering unique insights into the local culture and beautiful surroundings. Enjoy its distinct charm.

activities.title: Experience Hollywood Sharm
activities.description: Explore Hollywood Sharm, a lively destination sharing the same vibrant location as الفنار. Enjoy the atmosphere and various entertainment options available.

activities.title: Enjoy Soho Square Dancing Fountain
activities.description: As evening approaches, marvel at the spectacular Soho Square Dancing Fountain. A popular spot for families, featuring impressive water and light shows.

activities.title: Dinner at Mahony Restaurant
activities.description: Conclude your day with a delightful dinner at Mahony Restaurant, offering local and international cuisine with chef's specials in a comfortable setting.

activities.title: Stroll along Pedestrian Rd Neama Bay
activities.description: Start your day with a leisurely walk along the vibrant Pedestrian Rd Neama Bay, soaking in the local ambiance and observing daily life.

activities.title: Visit The Echo Temple
activities.description: Explore The Echo Temple, a unique site combining nature and culture. Discover its fascinating features and serene environment.

activities.title: Lunch at La cucina degli artisti
activities.description: Enjoy an exquisite lunch at La cucina degli artisti, known for its local and international specialties. A perfect mid-day break.

activities.title: Discover Paradise Sparrows
activities.description: Continue your exploration at Paradise Sparrows, a beautiful cultural spot offering a tranquil experience.

activities.title: Admire the Best view in Sharm el shiekh
activities.description: Capture stunning family memories at the 'Best view in Sharm el shiekh', offering panoramic vistas of the area. A truly picturesque spot.

activities.title: Relax at Peace Square
activities.description: Unwind at Peace Square, a significant cultural and natural landmark. Enjoy its serene atmosphere and historical importance.

activities.title: Dinner at Verde Basilico, Italian Restaurant
activities.description: Indulge in a fantastic dinner at Verde Basilico, an Italian restaurant renowned for its high rating and delightful chef's specials.

activities.title: Visit Sinai Sharm
activities.description: Start your day exploring Sinai Sharm, a popular cultural attraction offering unique insights into the region's heritage.

activities.title: Adventure at Safari Sharm El Sheikh
activities.description: Embark on an exciting adventure at Safari Sharm El Sheikh. This cultural attraction promises a thrilling and memorable experience for the family.

activities.title: Lunch at Verde Basilico, Italian Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy another delightful lunch at Verde Basilico, known for its exquisite Italian cuisine and high ratings, ensuring a pleasant dining experience.

activities.title: Explore Ras Mohamed Nature Reserve
activities.description: Immerse yourselves in the natural beauty and cultural significance of Ras Mohamed Nature Reserve, a top-rated destination. Discover its unique ecosystems.

activities.title: Discover Turpigfd
activities.description: Visit Turpigfd, a fascinating cultural attraction that offers a unique glimpse into the local heritage and environment.

activities.title: Evening at SOHO Square Sharm El Sheikh
activities.description: Spend your evening at SOHO Square Sharm El Sheikh, a lively hub for entertainment, shopping, and dining. Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere.

activities.title: Dinner at La cucina degli artisti
activities.description: Enjoy a final delicious dinner at La cucina degli artisti, savoring their local and international specialties before heading back to the hotel.

activities.title: Explore King Tut Museum
activities.description: Begin your last day with a cultural visit to the King Tut Museum, where you can marvel at ancient Egyptian artifacts. This museum is best visited in the morning.

activities.title: Hotel Check-out and Luggage Storage
activities.description: Check out from your hotel. You can arrange for luggage storage if you have a later flight, allowing you to enjoy the rest of your day unhindered.

activities.title: Lunch at Mahony Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy a final lunch in Sharm El-Sheikh at Mahony Restaurant, known for its excellent local and international dishes, conveniently located near the King Tut Museum.

activities.title: Visit Scritta SHARM
activities.description: Capture memorable photos at Scritta SHARM, a popular cultural landmark known for its iconic sign and excellent ratings. A perfect spot for a family picture.

activities.title: Experience El Sherif Safari
activities.description: Embark on another exciting adventure with El Sherif Safari, offering unique cultural experiences and a glimpse into the desert landscape.

activities.title: Discover Hollywood Sharm El Sheik
activities.description: Visit Hollywood Sharm El Sheik, a distinctive entertainment and nature attraction. Enjoy its unique blend of experiences before heading to your next stop.

activities.title: Explore سفينة خربة
activities.description: Conclude your cultural explorations at سفينة خربة, a unique spot that offers interesting insights and a different perspective on local attractions.

activities.title: Dinner at Ebn hamido seafood
activities.description: Enjoy a farewell dinner at Ebn hamido seafood, highly-rated for its local and international seafood dishes, concluding your trip with a memorable meal.
